original: **Environment variables:**
zh_tw: **環境變數：**

original:
| Variable                                   | Description               |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------------- |
| `OMC_OPENCLAW=1`                           | Enable OpenClaw           |
| `OMC_OPENCLAW_DEBUG=1`                     | Enable debug logging      |
| `OMC_OPENCLAW_CONFIG=/path/to/config.json` | Override config file path |
zh_tw:
| Variable                                   | Description               |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------------- |
| `OMC_OPENCLAW=1`                           | 啟用 OpenClaw             |
| `OMC_OPENCLAW_DEBUG=1`                     | 啟用除錯記錄              |
| `OMC_OPENCLAW_CONFIG=/path/to/config.json` | 覆寫設定檔路徑           |

original: **Supported hook events (6 active in bridge.ts):**
zh_tw: **支援的 hook 事件（bridge.ts 中有 6 個啟用中）：**

original:
| Event               | Trigger                                 | Key template variables                                |
| ------------------- | --------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `session-start`     | Session begins                          | `{{sessionId}}`, `{{projectName}}`, `{{projectPath}}` |
| `stop`              | Claude response completes               | `{{sessionId}}`, `{{projectName}}`                    |
| `keyword-detector`  | Every prompt submission                 | `{{prompt}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                         |
| `ask-user-question` | Claude requests user input              | `{{question}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                       |
| `pre-tool-use`      | Before tool invocation (high frequency) | `{{toolName}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                       |
| `post-tool-use`     | After tool invocation (high frequency)  | `{{toolName}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                       |
zh_tw:
| Event               | Trigger                                 | Key template variables                                |
| ------------------- | --------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `session-start`     | 工作階段開始                          | `{{sessionId}}`, `{{projectName}}`, `{{projectPath}}` |
| `stop`              | Claude 回應完成                       | `{{sessionId}}`, `{{projectName}}`                    |
| `keyword-detector`  | 每次提示提交                          | `{{prompt}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                         |
| `ask-user-question` | Claude 請求使用者輸入                | `{{question}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                       |
| `pre-tool-use`      | 在工具呼叫之前（高頻率）            | `{{toolName}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                       |
| `post-tool-use`     | 在工具呼叫之後（高頻率）            | `{{toolName}}`, `{{sessionId}}`                       |

original: **Reply channel environment variables:**
zh_tw: **回覆通道環境變數：**

original:
| Variable                 | Description                    |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------------ |
| `OPENCLAW_REPLY_CHANNEL` | Reply channel (e.g. `discord`) |
| `OPENCLAW_REPLY_TARGET`  | Channel ID                     |
| `OPENCLAW_REPLY_THREAD`  | Thread ID                      |
zh_tw:
| Variable                 | Description                    |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------------ |
| `OPENCLAW_REPLY_CHANNEL` | 回覆通道（例如 `discord`）    |
| `OPENCLAW_REPLY_TARGET`  | 頻道 ID                       |
| `OPENCLAW_REPLY_THREAD`  | 討論串 ID                    |

original: See `scripts/openclaw-gateway-demo.mjs` for a reference gateway that relays OpenClaw payloads to Discord via ClawdBot.
zh_tw: 請參閱 `scripts/openclaw-gateway-demo.mjs`，其中有一個參考用的 gateway，會透過 ClawdBot 將 OpenClaw 載荷轉送到 Discord。

original: ## Documentation
zh_tw: ## 文件

original:
- **[Full Reference](docs/REFERENCE.md)** - Complete feature documentation
- **[CLI Reference](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#cli-reference)** - All `omc` commands, flags, and tools
- **[Notifications Guide](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#notifications)** - Discord, Telegram, Slack, and webhook setup
- **[Recommended Workflows](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#workflows)** - Battle-tested skill chains for common tasks
- **[Release Notes](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#release-notes)** - What's new in each version
- **[Website](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website)** - Interactive guides and examples
- **[Migration Guide](docs/MIGRATION.md)** - Upgrade from v2.x
- **[Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)** - How it works under the hood
- **[Performance Monitoring](docs/PERFORMANCE-MONITORING.md)** - Agent tracking, debugging, and optimization
- **[Model × Agent Compatibility Matrix](docs/agents/model-compatibility.md)** - Which model to pair with each agent (premium / balanced / budget presets)
- **[Security Guide](SECURITY.md)** - Enterprise deployment and hardening
zh_tw:
- **[完整參考](docs/REFERENCE.md)** - 完整的功能文件
- **[CLI 參考](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#cli-reference)** - 所有 `omc` 命令、旗標與工具
- **[通知指南](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#notifications)** - Discord、Telegram、Slack 與 webhook 設定
- **[推薦工作流程](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#workflows)** - 經過實戰驗證的常見任務技能鏈
- **[版本說明](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#release-notes)** - 每個版本的新內容
- **[網站](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website)** - 互動式指南與範例
- **[遷移指南](docs/MIGRATION.md)** - 從 v2.x 升級
- **[架構](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)** - 底層如何運作
- **[效能監控](docs/PERFORMANCE-MONITORING.md)** - Agent 追蹤、除錯與最佳化
- **[模型 × Agent 相容性矩陣](docs/agents/model-compatibility.md)** - 每個 agent 要搭配哪個模型（高階／平衡／經濟預設）
- **[安全指南](SECURITY.md)** - 企業部署與加固

original: ## Requirements
zh_tw: ## 需求

original:
- [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/claude-code) CLI
- Claude Max/Pro subscription OR Anthropic API key
zh_tw:
- [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/claude-code) CLI
- Claude Max/Pro 訂閱方案或 Anthropic API 金鑰

original: ### Platform & tmux
zh_tw: ### 平台與 tmux

original: OMC features like `omc team` and rate-limit detection require **tmux**:
zh_tw: OMC 的功能，例如 `omc team` 和速率限制偵測，需要 **tmux**：

original:
| Platform       | tmux provider                                         | Install                 |
| -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------- |
| macOS          | [tmux](https://github.com/tmux/tmux)                  | `brew install tmux`     |
| Ubuntu/Debian  | tmux                                                  | `sudo apt install tmux` |
| Fedora         | tmux                                                  | `sudo dnf install tmux` |
| Arch           | tmux                                                  | `sudo pacman -S tmux`   |
| Windows        | [psmux](https://github.com/marlocarlo/psmux) (native) | `winget install psmux`  |
| Windows (WSL2) | tmux (inside WSL)                                     | `sudo apt install tmux` |
zh_tw:
| Platform       | tmux 提供者                                        | 安裝                    |
| -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------- |
| macOS          | [tmux](https://github.com/tmux/tmux)                  | `brew install tmux`     |
| Ubuntu/Debian  | tmux                                                  | `sudo apt install tmux` |
| Fedora         | tmux                                                  | `sudo dnf install tmux` |
| Arch           | tmux                                                  | `sudo pacman -S tmux`   |
| Windows        | [psmux](https://github.com/marlocarlo/psmux)（原生）  | `winget install psmux`  |
| Windows (WSL2) | tmux（在 WSL 內）                                     | `sudo apt install tmux` |

original: > **Windows users:** [psmux](https://github.com/marlocarlo/psmux) provides a native `tmux` binary for Windows with 76 tmux-compatible commands. No WSL required.
zh_tw: > **Windows 使用者：** [psmux](https://github.com/marlocarlo/psmux) 提供 Windows 原生的 `tmux` 二進位檔，支援 76 個相容於 tmux 的命令。不需要 WSL。

original: ### Optional: Multi-AI Orchestration
zh_tw: ### 選用：多 AI 協調

original: OMC can optionally orchestrate external AI providers for cross-validation and design consistency. These are **not required** — OMC works fully without them.
zh_tw: OMC 可選擇編排外部 AI 提供者，以進行交叉驗證與設計一致性檢查。這些**不是必要條件**，OMC 在沒有它們的情況下也能完整運作。

original:
| Provider                                                  | Install                             | What it enables                                  |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli) | `npm install -g @google/gemini-cli` | Design review, UI consistency (1M token context) |
| [Codex CLI](https://github.com/openai/codex)              | `npm install -g @openai/codex`      | Architecture validation, code review cross-check |
zh_tw:
| Provider                                                  | Install                             | 可啟用的功能                                     |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli) | `npm install -g @google/gemini-cli` | 設計審查、UI 一致性（1M token 上下文）          |
| [Codex CLI](https://github.com/openai/codex)              | `npm install -g @openai/codex`      | 架構驗證、程式碼審查交叉檢查                    |

original: **Cost:** 3 Pro plans (Claude + Gemini + ChatGPT) cover everything for ~$60/month.
zh_tw: **成本：** 3 個 Pro 方案（Claude + Gemini + ChatGPT）即可涵蓋全部，約每月 60 美元。
